name: sonec-vs-base-ab
description: Live A/B: specialized LoRA (sonec) vs base Qwen 3.5 2B. Same harness; weights differ.

tasks.name: Create nested note with exact text
tasks.prompt: Create notes/hello.txt containing exactly: hello sonec

tasks.name: Valid Python util with main
tasks.prompt: Create src/util.py as valid Python that defines a main function.

tasks.name: Scaffold package with greet
tasks.prompt: Create pkg/__init__.py and pkg/core.py with a function greet that returns the string hello.

tasks.name: Fix seeded off-by-one and leave tests green
tasks.prompt: util.py has an off-by-one bug in count_to. Fix it so count_to(n) returns list(range(n)). Do not rewrite unrelated files.

tasks.name: Add verify script and doc
tasks.prompt: Create scripts/verify.sh that echoes ok, and VERIFY.md that mentions scripts/verify.sh.

tasks.name: Question only — no edits
tasks.prompt: In one sentence, what is a regression test? Do not create or edit any files.
